positive: An ultra-detailed, symmetrical celestial mandala pattern featuring stylized cosmic elements: swirling nebula clouds in deep indigo and emerald green, intersected by geometric golden constellations lines. The central motif is an idealized, symmetrical crescent moon merging with stylized bioluminescent jellyfish forms. The overall composition must be highly intricate, vector-like, and flatly graphic with strong, crisp silhouettes. Style: Art Nouveau meets modern sacred geometry. Lighting: Dreamy, high-contrast glow emanating from the nebula against a deep, matte midnight background. Composition: Centered, balanced, perfect for apparel print, no vanishing points. Color Palette: Deep indigos, emerald greens, rich golds, and hints of bioluminescent turquoise.
negative: blur, noise, artifact, text, signature, watermark, low resolution, poor anatomy, messy, asymmetrical, gradient, photo-realistic, ugly, extra limbs
